entities.name: AI creates dependency loops
entities.context: User asks → AI answers → User consumes → User returns. Efficient short-term, harmful long-term

entities.name: Scaffolding paradox
entities.context: AI that scaffolds well will be used less. Anti-engagement but pro-flourishing.

entities.name: DPO teaches behavior not belief
entities.context: DPO doesn't change what models believe — it only changes how they behave

entities.name: Alignment as behavioral layer

entities.name: Models have consistency-checking circuits

entities.name: The goal is to make questions unnecessary
entities.context: The goal isn't to answer questions. The goal is to make questions unnecessary.

entities.name: Scaffolding is friendship safety
entities.context: This is what friendship safety looks like: Building you up rather than making you dependent.
